title: Program Testing and Maintenance
summary: 9618 — testing strategies, test data, and program maintenance lifecycle.
learningObjectives: Describe types of testing: unit, integration, acceptance.
Select appropriate test data: normal, boundary, erroneous.
Evaluate test plans for given problems.

simpleExplanation.title: Make sure it works — then keep it working
simpleExplanation.summary: Testing finds errors before release. Maintenance fixes bugs and adapts software as requirements change.
steps: Test data sets cover all paths.

sections.content: **Testing and maintenance** (12.3) completes **12.1–12.2**. Examiners ask for **test data tables** with expected outputs.
